  "notes": "The document presents active member distributions by age and service per agency/group. To capture ALL active members (10,974 total), I transcribed the three group-level tables that together cover the whole system: 'General Employees – Total' (p66, 8,442), 'Policemen' (p69, 1,827), and 'Firemen' (p70, 705). Code should sum the three source tables cell-wise (they share identical row/col labels). Note: only source_tables[0] labels are referenced in the maps per the format; the additional tables (indices 1 and 2) carry identical bins and are meant to be added. Source service columns are labeled Under 5, 5-10, 10-15, 15-20, 20-25, 25-30, 30-35, 35-40 which are treated as 0-4, 5-9, 10-14, 15-19, 20-24, 25-29, 30-34, 35-40 (upper-bound convention matches target). Age bins align exactly with target rows (24 & Under=<25, 65 & Up=70/65+). Total rows and columns were excluded from cells and recorded in printed totals for validation."
}
